title: Improved Backpacked Recipe
description: Adds a better recipe for the mod "Backpacked" to use the "Expanded storage" mod for its recipe
body:
## Archived due to expanded storage being removed from modrinth

Changes the backpack's recipe to use **4 leather**, **2 string**, **2 mini chests**, and **1 gold chest** instead of the default rabbit hide.

![Image of the new recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e990452d60d4363fdb8754d9fbd0c9e8e5a255d.png)
